Question: Provide a technical summary for KEV {kev:KEV.vulnerabilityName} (CVE {kev.cveID}) in {kev.product} from {kev.vendorProject}, including its weakness type.

Answer: KEV {kev.vulnerabilityName} with CVE ID {kev.cveID} affects {kev.product} (from {kev.vendorProject}). Description: {kev.shortDescription}. Mitigation: {kev.requiredAction}. Weakness(es) involved: {kev.cwes}.

query: MATCH (kev:KEV)          LIMIT 2000     RETURN DISTINCT kev.vulnerabilityName, kev.cveID, kev.product, kev.vendorProject, kev.shortDescription, kev.requiredAction, kev.cwes     ORDER BY rand()
